response.global_analysis: The video features two karaoke performances with dialogue intermissions. Karaoke 1 is 'Mousou Zei' by Ouro Kronii, and Karaoke 2 is 'Fairy Tail' by Hakos Baelz. The Reference JSON provides lyrics for both, but the video includes additional verses for 'Mousou Zei' not present in the JSON; I used on-screen text to transcribe these accurately. I have discarded leftover JSON lyrics that were not sung. Timing is strictly tied to vocal activation, with separate blocks for mid-sentence pauses to maintain audio-visual alignment.

subtitles.original: （叫び声）
subtitles.english: (Screaming)

subtitles.original: バランスが取れない…
subtitles.english: I can barely balance...

subtitles.original: 少し重力が必要だね、よし。
subtitles.english: You need a bit of gravity, right? Good.

subtitles.original: 痛い、痛いよ。
subtitles.english: Ow, that hurts.

subtitles.original: 血流はどう？リフレッシュした気分？
subtitles.english: How's your blood flow? Do you feel refreshed?

subtitles.original: いい感じだね。よし！
subtitles.english: You look great. All right!

subtitles.original: スコアが出たみたい。見てみようか。
subtitles.english: Looks like the score is in. Shall we see it?

subtitles.original: 結果はこれだ！ジャジャーン！
subtitles.english: This is what you got! Ta-da!

subtitles.original: こんなに低いスコア取ったことないよ。
subtitles.english: I've never gotten a score that low before.

subtitles.original: 70.161。すごいじゃん！
subtitles.english: 70.161. That's so good!

subtitles.original: いいスコアだよ、何言ってるの？
subtitles.english: That's good! What are you talking about?

subtitles.original: 70なら、C…いや、Bだ。Bだよ。
subtitles.english: 70, that's a C... no, B. That's a B.

subtitles.original: Bマイナス？いいじゃん。
subtitles.english: B-minus? Yeah, that's good.

subtitles.original: Bマイナスかな？C…Cマイナスだよ。
subtitles.english: Is it a B-minus? That's a C... a C-minus.

subtitles.original: 違う違う、Bマイナスだよ。
subtitles.english: No, no, no... it's a B-minus.

subtitles.original: それじゃ、次は誰が行く？
subtitles.english: All righty then. Who wants to go next?

subtitles.original: 先輩！先輩！あ、先輩じゃない。
subtitles.english: Senpai! Senpai! Oh, wait, she's not senpai.

subtitles.original: 2時間差で先輩なんだよね。
subtitles.english: She's senpai by two hours.

subtitles.original: 2時間だった？確かそれくらい。
subtitles.english: Was it two hours? I think it was around then.

subtitles.original: そんなこと言われたの初めてだわ。
subtitles.english: I've never heard that from you before.

subtitles.original: わかった、じゃあ行くよ！
subtitles.english: Okay, I guess! I'll go!

subtitles.original: 楽しんじゃうぞ！
subtitles.english: I'm gonna have so much fun!

subtitles.original: クロニー、何の曲を歌ってくれるの？
subtitles.english: Okay, so Kronii, what song are you gonna sing?

subtitles.original: 「妄想税」を歌います。
subtitles.english: I'm gonna be singing 'Mousou Zei'.

subtitles.original: おお、妄想税！やったー！
subtitles.english: Oh, Mousou Zei! Yay!

subtitles.original: 古い曲しか知らないからね！
subtitles.english: Because I only know old songs!

subtitles.original: 最高！その曲知ってるよ！
subtitles.english: That's great! I know that song!

subtitles.original: よし、じゃあお願い！
subtitles.english: Okay then. All right, please!

subtitles.original: ミュージック・スタート！
subtitles.english: Start the music! Music start!

subtitles.original: あの⁠子⁠も⁠い⁠い⁠な
subtitles.english: That girl is nice, too

subtitles.original: あの⁠子⁠も⁠い⁠い⁠な
subtitles.english: And that girl is nice, too

subtitles.original: 頭⁠の⁠中⁠で⁠イ⁠イ⁠コ⁠ト⁠し⁠て⁠る
subtitles.english: Doing good things inside my head

subtitles.original: あ⁠な⁠た⁠は⁠そ⁠れ⁠で⁠満⁠足⁠で⁠す⁠か⁠？
subtitles.english: Are you satisfied with that?

subtitles.original: 叶⁠え⁠た⁠い⁠と⁠は⁠思⁠い⁠ま⁠せ⁠ん⁠か⁠？
subtitles.english: Don't you want to make it come true?

subtitles.original: あの⁠子⁠で⁠い⁠い⁠や
subtitles.english: She'll do

subtitles.original: あの⁠子⁠で⁠い⁠い⁠や
subtitles.english: She'll do

subtitles.original: 妥⁠協⁠大⁠好⁠き⁠ ⁠飲⁠む⁠針⁠千⁠本
subtitles.english: I love compromising, I'll swallow a thousand needles

subtitles.original: あ⁠な⁠た⁠は⁠そ⁠れ⁠で⁠満⁠足⁠で⁠す⁠か⁠？
subtitles.english: Are you satisfied with that?

subtitles.original: 叶⁠え⁠た⁠い⁠と⁠は⁠思⁠い⁠ま⁠せ⁠ん⁠か⁠？
subtitles.english: Don't you want to make it come true?

subtitles.original: 納⁠め⁠ま⁠し⁠ょ⁠う⁠妄⁠想⁠税
subtitles.english: Let's pay the Delusion Tax

subtitles.original: 皆⁠様⁠の⁠暮⁠ら⁠し⁠を⁠豊⁠か⁠に⁠す⁠る⁠た⁠め⁠に
subtitles.english: To make everyone's lives more prosperous

subtitles.original: 叶⁠え⁠た⁠い⁠た⁠い⁠た⁠い⁠を⁠現⁠実⁠に
subtitles.english: Make those 'wants' a reality

subtitles.original: 今⁠、⁠未⁠来⁠来⁠来⁠来⁠を⁠買⁠い⁠戻⁠せ
subtitles.english: Now, buy back the future

subtitles.original: ア⁠レ⁠し⁠た⁠い⁠し⁠た⁠い⁠病⁠も⁠欲⁠し⁠が⁠り⁠も
subtitles.english: Those 'I want to do that' diseases and cravings

subtitles.original: さ⁠あ⁠、⁠痛⁠い⁠だ⁠い⁠た⁠い⁠の⁠そ⁠の⁠向⁠こ⁠う⁠へ
subtitles.english: Now, beyond that pain

subtitles.original: そ⁠う⁠、⁠汚⁠い⁠妄⁠想⁠は
subtitles.english: That's right, dirty delusions

subtitles.original: 汚⁠い⁠お⁠金⁠で⁠解⁠決⁠さ⁠せ⁠ま⁠し⁠ょ⁠う
subtitles.english: Let's settle them with dirty money

subtitles.original: Yeah!?
subtitles.english: Yeah!?

subtitles.original: 素晴らしかったよ！
subtitles.english: You did amazing!

subtitles.original: 荒々しさが出てた気がする。
subtitles.english: I feel like that brought out a roughness.

subtitles.original: うわ！あれで本当に歌えたの？
subtitles.english: Whoa! You could actually sing on that?

subtitles.original: わあ、血行が良くなるわ。
subtitles.english: Oh wow, blood circulation.

subtitles.original: すごい血の巡りだ。わあ。
subtitles.english: That's a lot of blood circulation. Wow.

subtitles.original: スコアが出たわ。クロニーの結果は…
subtitles.english: The score is in. Let's see what Kronii got.

subtitles.original: おおお！やったー！
subtitles.english: Whoa! Yay!

subtitles.original: まだ前半だし。まだいけるよ。
subtitles.english: Wait, it's still the first half. I can still make it.

subtitles.original: まだ前半。よし、次は私だ！
subtitles.english: Still first half. All right, I'll go next!

subtitles.original: やった！楽しみだ。わくわくする。
subtitles.english: Yay! Let's go! I'm excited.

subtitles.original: この曲ずっと歌いたかったんだ。
subtitles.english: I've been wanting to sing this song for so long.

subtitles.original: 何の曲？何を歌うの？
subtitles.english: Okay, what song is it? What are you singing?

subtitles.original: アリエッティ、約束の日！ついに！
subtitles.english: Arrietty, Yakusoku no Hi! Finally!

subtitles.original: やっとインストを見つけたよ。楽しみ！
subtitles.english: I finally found an instrumental track. I'm so excited.

subtitles.original: 子供の頃の曲かな。
subtitles.english: Your childhood, I'm assuming.

subtitles.original: いや、そうでもない。
subtitles.english: No, not really.

subtitles.original: フェアリーテイルね…よし。
subtitles.english: Fairy Tail, now... all right.

subtitles.original: 足つぼマットに乗ってね。
subtitles.english: Please hop onto the foot reflexology mat.

subtitles.original: 失敗しないでね。準備はいい？
subtitles.english: Don't fail me. You ready?

subtitles.original: ああ！
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: よし、歌い始めて！ミュージック・スタート！
subtitles.english: All right, please start singing! Music start!

subtitles.original: フ⁠ェ⁠ア⁠リ⁠ー⁠テ⁠イ⁠ル
subtitles.english: Fairy Tail

subtitles.original: こ⁠の⁠手⁠で⁠掴⁠ん⁠だ⁠光⁠は
subtitles.english: The light I grasped with this hand

subtitles.original: 夢⁠に⁠描⁠い⁠た⁠理⁠想⁠郷
subtitles.english: The utopia I drew in my dreams

subtitles.original: 夢⁠の⁠ま⁠ま⁠終⁠わ⁠ら⁠せ⁠な⁠い
subtitles.english: I won't let it end as just a dream

subtitles.original: い⁠つ⁠か⁠会⁠え⁠る
subtitles.english: Someday I'll meet

subtitles.original: 未⁠来⁠の⁠僕⁠に⁠伝⁠え⁠た⁠い
subtitles.english: I want to tell my future self

subtitles.original: 時⁠に⁠未⁠来⁠は⁠残⁠酷⁠で
subtitles.english: Sometimes the future is cruel

subtitles.original: 鏡⁠の⁠よ⁠う⁠に⁠割⁠れ⁠る⁠け⁠ど
subtitles.english: And cracks like a mirror

subtitles.original: 欠⁠片⁠を⁠失⁠く⁠さ⁠な⁠い⁠よ⁠う
subtitles.english: So that I don't lose those fragments

subtitles.original: 見⁠つ⁠け⁠出⁠せ⁠ば⁠い⁠い
subtitles.english: I just need to find them

subtitles.original: 凍⁠え⁠る⁠闇⁠が
subtitles.english: Even if the freezing darkness

subtitles.original: 僕⁠た⁠ち⁠の⁠行⁠く⁠手⁠塞⁠い⁠で⁠も
subtitles.english: Blocks our path

subtitles.original: き⁠っ⁠と⁠忘⁠れ⁠な⁠い⁠ ⁠希⁠望
subtitles.english: I'll surely never forget our hope

subtitles.original: フ⁠ェ⁠ア⁠リ⁠ー⁠テ⁠イ⁠ル
subtitles.english: Fairy Tail

subtitles.original: こ⁠の⁠手⁠で⁠掴⁠ん⁠だ⁠光⁠は
subtitles.english: The light I grasped with this hand

subtitles.original: 絆⁠の⁠力⁠ ⁠溢⁠れ⁠て⁠い⁠る⁠か⁠ら
subtitles.english: Because the power of our bonds is overflowing
